TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Talum

S.FORM: at aiza sisiuh isian sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 有青蛙在瓶子裡面。
There was frog inside a bottle .

S.FORM: a pahainanan naicia.
S.TRANSL: 他們玩那個青蛙。
They had fun with the frog.

S.FORM: naia hai mapasisivit at.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直互相對看。
They watched each other.

S.FORM: masabah in ‘uvaaz a hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那個孩子睡著了。
Then the child fell asleep.

S.FORM: maza sisiuh a hai munapav mataidaza munapav sia pan cia.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙從瓶子裡跳出來了。
The frog jumped out from the bottle.

S.FORM: at cinhuza ‘uvaaz a sadu tu iatu uka ung tu sisiuh sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後孩子很驚訝看到為什麼青蛙沒有在瓶子裡面了。
Then he was shocked to find out why the frog was not inside the bottle anymore.

S.FORM: at mindangkaz ‘uvaaz a minkailas ‘uvaaz a.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子起床了。
Then he got up (from the bed).

S.FORM: at saduan a kucu a tu ingadah cia maza sisiuh a tunghabin hai uka.
S.TRANSL: 他看那個鞋子，看青蛙是否躲在裡面。沒有。
He saw the shoe, wondering whether it hid still inside. No.

S.FORM: ung at maza asuluhi a hai kungadah sia pan cia maza isaicia bungu kudii saak tu masikua dau sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 小狗把自己的頭放進瓶子裡，到那邊去聞青蛙到底往哪裡去。
Then the puppy put its head into the bottle,smelling to find out where the frog was going.

S.FORM: ung at kilimun naicia uka at idii naiia malala’la.
S.TRANSL: 他們尋找，但是沒有。然後他們在那邊一直叫喊。
They looked for it but find nothing. Then they were yelling all along over there.

S.FORM: at una‘u s ‘uvaaz cia dau maliba tu madahpa mikua milu’lu ung ii maza pan a hai panpulpul.
S.TRANSL: 然後，因為瓶子是摔破的，那個孩子抱它，看它是否很痛，是否受傷。
#e Then the child embraced the dog, checking if it felt hurt, if it was okay or injured because of the bottle’s being broken out.

S.FORM: at mudaan naiia kunata ah tupaun tu kunata sia ung tu naicia tangnata.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就走出去外面到所謂的走廊。
Then they went out to the so-called corridor.

S.FORM: at kudii naia malala’la sisiuh cia tu usa bi s ung tu usa kasu hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們去一直叫青蛙說: 你去哪裡了？
Then they went over there, keeping yelling: “Hey frog, where did you go?”

S.FORM: nii naia zaav tu ung tu idii naia matahusing mala’la’ hai.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後，他們就在那裡一直吵著叫喊。
Before long, they kept yelling noisily there.

S.FORM: inkaduan a naia s aiza tu tasa laak lalaak.
S.TRANSL: 他們找到一個洞。
They found a hole.

S.FORM: kudii a maza ‘uvaaz a masivit mas laak cia aupa ‘ipun saicia.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子去那個洞那邊觀察吹氣。
The kid went there to see the hole and to blow at that hole.

S.FORM: ah tupaun zami tu aluaz.
S.TRANSL: 我們叫那個老鼠。
We call it mouse.

S.FORM: ung at maza asu a hai malka’uni s usaduan saia mas tupaun tu isia lukis tu aih bahusaz.
S.TRANSL: 他看見在樹上所謂的虎頭蜂窩。
The dog then stared at the hornets’ nest.

S.FORM: ung at maza aluaz a hai mun‘apav amin.
S.TRANSL: 那個老鼠也跑出來。
The mouse also showed up.

S.FORM: sinapu s bahusaz cia maza sia asu a ung at maza 'uvaaz a hai macisbai cisdadaan amin naia tunghabin (au)pa.
S.TRANSL: 那個虎頭蜂追那個狗，然後孩子也跑去躲起來了。
The dog was cased by the hornets, and the kid also ran away to hide.

S.FORM: sinapu s kukuav cia tu na tauhtauhun a bungu a kalat.
S.TRANSL: 因為要被老鷹追著啄咬他的頭。
The eagle flied after him and tried to peck and bite him.

S.FORM: at kudadaza naia sia batu cia tunghabin maza asu hai tunghabin amin nastu ii.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬到石頭上面，狗也躲在下面。
Then they went onto the stone, and the dog hid behind.

S.FORM: sisinapu s bahusaz cia nadau saia kinalat hai madahpa at idii matu’anuthul.
S.TRANSL: 他一直被虎頭蜂追，可能有被咬過很痛，他在那裡很無奈。
He was chased by the hornets; maybe he was bitten. He felt so depressed there.

S.FORM: at tunghabin naia sia batu sia lukis hai nii naia haiap tu maza asu hai mudadaan saia ‘a’azaz’ hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就躲在石頭, 在木頭，不知道那個狗還在跑來跑去。
He hid behind the stone and the wood, not knowing the dog was still running over.

S.FORM: masinap usadua s hanvang at tupaun tu ngabul sinapun saicia.
S.TRANSL: 原來有一隻牛，叫做山鹿在追他。
A buffalo or a deer was running after it.

S.FORM: hai macisbai amin a hanvang at cisdadaan dau ii aupa na macisbai hai nii tu haiap tu kaz maza ‘uvaaz a hai ka malavi s asu cia muhalhal mucingkul.
S.TRANSL: 那個鹿也跑掉，因為也要逃跑，不知道那個孩子和狗狗跟著它(鹿)掉下來, 跌倒。
The deer rans away too. Because running away, it didn’t know the kid and the dog was dropped and fell.

S.FORM: lanangadah ‘uvaaz a mas asu cia sia danum lanangadah naia sia danum at idii a hanvang masivit naicia at.
S.TRANSL: 狗跟孩子同時都掉進河水裡了，鹿在那裡看著他們。。
The dog and the kid dropped into the water at the same time, and the deer was over there looking at them.

S.FORM: aupa lanangadah sia danum hai maza asu luhi a hai ung tu ansahanu s ‘uvaaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 因為那個小狗掉進水裡，孩子把他扛起。
Because the dog dropped into the water, it is carried by the kid.

S.FORM: undusaan amin idii islunghu.
S.TRANSL: 也有兩隻青蛙一起在那邊休息。
Also two frogs took a rest there.

S.FORM: pa cinnaskal naia tu inkaduanan in maza sia sisiuh an at.
S.TRANSL: 他們就很開心的找到這個青蛙。
They were happy because they found the frog.

S.FORM: ung hai malampuk in amin inkaduanan in naicia maza sia sisiuh an at.
S.TRANSL: 他們聚在一起了，他們找到這個青蛙了。
They got together, they found the frog.

S.FORM: sia tu tu sia sisiuh tu tas tu lumah an cia malampuk amin sia danum sia batu sia lukis tu lalaak cia.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙的一家人也聚集在水裡、在石頭或樹洞裡面。
The frog family also got together around the water, the stone, or the tree holes.

S.FORM: idii naia amin a malampuk at 'uvaaz hai kanahtung naia tu inkaduanan in at.
S.TRANSL: 大家都在那邊集中一起，那孩子結束了他的尋找。
Everyone is there together, and the kid finished looking for (the frog).

S.FORM: amin a ‘uvaaz a hai asu hai dasun amin saicia.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子也把狗帶走了。
The kid brought over his dog.

S.FORM: madas saia tu tasa mas nautu saipukun saicia tu maza sia sisiuh mapisia lumah suhaisun saicia mapisia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他把他本來養的那隻青蛙帶回家，放回到瓶子裡。
He brought the frog he had kept back to the home and put it into the bottle.
